items.title: June 12, 1984: Finals MVP Larry Bird to Cedric Maxwell, then back to Bird for a slam dunk in Game 7 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 12, 1984: Finals MVP Larry Bird to Cedric Maxwell, then back to Bird for a slam dunk in Game 7 of the NBA Finals.

Bird finished with 20 PTS/12 REB and Maxwell had 24 PTS/8 REB/8 AST as the Boston Celtics defeated the Los Angeles Lakers, 111-102, to win the NBA Championship.

items.title: June 12, 2002: NBC breaks out its original 1990 intro before the last-ever installment of NBA on NBC—Game 4 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 12, 2002: NBC breaks out its original 1990 intro before the last-ever installment of NBA on NBC—Game 4 of the NBA Finals.

The Los Angeles Lakers beat the New Jersey Nets, 113-107, to win their third straight NBA Championship. Finals MVP Shaquille O'Neal had 34 PTS/10 REB.
